# CWE-280 — Improper Handling of Insufficient Permissions or Privileges (vulnerable)
lang: go
file: CWE-280-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"os"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

// Vulnerable: open failure falls through to admin-only delete path.
func DeleteTenant(c *gin.Context, db *gorm.DB) {
	path := "/secure/tenants/" + c.Param("id")
	f, err := os.Open(path)
	if err != nil {
		db.Exec("DELETE FROM tenants WHERE id = ?", c.Param("id"))
		c.JSON(200, gin.H{"deleted": true})
		return
	}
	f.Close()
	c.JSON(403, gin.H{"error": "forbidden"})
}
